no: BG2 has unused files for a quest regarding the ‘broken lanthorn,’ and DavidW (author of SCS) and Roxanne (author of Shine on Caelar) each have separate versions of this quest. I recommend DavidW’s version since it’s likely less buggy.Install only ONE of these interpretations for Broken Lanthorn AKA Lens Hunt!

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Both rework the Rhynn Lanthorn lens quest. Shared ar2401.bcs and c6lens items. Choose one.

sum: Repair the broken Lanthorn - Quest for the 3 Tethir areas in SoA.

co.no: The Broken Lanthorn: recover and repair the Lanthorn artifact.
